rooms.name: Presidential Suite
rooms.description: Experience the pinnacle of luxury in our Presidential Suite. Featuring a private terrace with ocean views, a separate living area, and a lavish marble bathroom with a jacuzzi tub.
rooms.longDescription: The Presidential Suite at Royella Resort offers an unparalleled experience of luxury and comfort. Spread across 1200 square feet, this suite features a master bedroom with a king-sized bed, a separate living room, dining area, and a private balcony overlooking the ocean. The marble bathroom includes a jacuzzi tub, rain shower, and premium toiletries.

rooms.name: Deluxe Ocean View
rooms.description: Wake up to breathtaking ocean views in our Deluxe Ocean View room. Enjoy modern amenities and a private balcony to soak in the stunning sunsets.
rooms.longDescription: Our Deluxe Ocean View rooms offer the perfect blend of comfort and style. With floor-to-ceiling windows that frame the azure waters, these rooms provide a serene retreat. The room features a queen-sized bed, a seating area, and a private balcony where you can enjoy your morning coffee while watching the waves.

rooms.name: Executive Room
rooms.description: Perfect for business travelers, our Executive Room combines comfort with functionality. Features a dedicated workspace and ergonomic chair.
rooms.longDescription: Designed with the modern traveler in mind, our Executive Rooms offer a perfect balance of work and relaxation. The room includes a king-sized bed, a large work desk with ergonomic chair, and high-speed internet access. After a busy day, unwind in the comfortable seating area or enjoy a show on the smart TV.

rooms.name: Family Suite
rooms.description: Spacious suite for families with connecting areas and ocean glimpses.
rooms.longDescription: Our Family Suite offers two queen beds, a living nook, and extra storage—ideal for longer stays with children.

rooms.name: Standard Room
rooms.description: Comfortable essentials with smart layout and quiet HVAC.
rooms.longDescription: A cozy retreat with a double bed, work desk, and rain shower—perfect for short city–beach trips.
